item.title: Learn, todo and done 4-8/1/21
item.description: Learn Clean Code, YouTube PHP: The Right Way, link Udemy courses Google Chrome Developer Tools, youtube Todo - Project repo, doc Todo Add citation button #83 3.1 Remove html entities from Text return Done - Project Look into Publons API access -Created an account -Get the API token: c49ee6b0ddac5cabd4340fe77c3f2034dc54668e Done Allow other web sites to make link previews #513 1.1 Add Open Graph meta-tags

Learn PHP Unit Testing with PHPUnit, Udemy The Complete Docker Course for PHP Developers, Udemy Docker & Kubernetes: The Practical Guide, Udemy Object Oriented PHP & TDD with PHPUnit from Scratch, Udemy The Complete 2021 Software Testing Bootcamp, Udemy Reference
